title: Rich Red Ethiopian Fish Stew
description: A cultured and gooey pescatarian-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring red chilli, this stew is a quick fix for a weeknight dinner, grilled to perfection in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
Season the red snapper fillets with salt and black pepper.
Grill the red snapper fillets for 2 minutes on each side, then set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the diced onion to the Dutch oven and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the Dutch oven and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced red chilli peppers to the Dutch oven and cook for 1 minute.
Add the berbere spice, fish stock, and tomato paste to the Dutch oven, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 10 minutes.
Add the grilled red snapper fillets to the Dutch oven and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
